case_title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. MAUDELLE V MITCHELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, MAUDELLE V DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-17-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-04-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-06-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL RE OSC (TRANSACTION ID # 65785440) FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-04-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-06-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64484055) FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65836630)
